message:
fix: add retry loop for Windows binary existence check after zip extraction (fix-merge PR #2753)

Windows NTFS metadata visibility lag causes fs.existsSync to return false
immediately after Expand-Archive completes. Add poll-retry loop (10x200ms)
on Windows only, mirroring existing waitForFileAccess pattern.

Fixes #2741.

Co-Authored-By: Marco Del Pin <marcodelpin@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
